title: euphorbia fendleri
intro: Euphorbia fendleri, also known as Fendler's spineless euphorb or Fendler's spineless cactus, is a species of succulent plant in the spurge family Euphorbiaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Euphorbia fendleri include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate pain, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as tinctures, salves, and infusions, and its extracts are also used in modern medicine for their potential therapeutic effects.
